title: BEM-691 Claude primary proof prep
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/provider_gates','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-19 | 05:50 (UTC+3)'
workflow_candidates=[]
wf_dir=Path('.github/workflows')
if wf_dir.exists():
    for f in sorted(wf_dir.glob('*.yml'))+sorted(wf_dir.glob('*.yaml')):
        txt=f.read_text(errors='ignore')
        low=(f.name+' '+txt).lower()
        if 'claude' in low or 'anthropic' in low or 'claude_code_oauth_token' in low:
            workflow_candidates.append({'path':str(f),'has_workflow_dispatch':'workflow_dispatch' in txt,'has_claude_secret':'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN' in txt,'preview':txt[:1200]})
# Create a minimal provider gate request artifact; do not print token.
gate=Path('governance/provider_gates/bem691_claude_primary_runtime_proof_request.json')
gate.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'claude_primary_runtime_proof_request.v1','bem':'BEM-691','status':'prepared','goal':'prove Claude primary runtime by running minimal Claude workflow and obtaining commit SHA','required_secret':'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN presence only; token must never be printed','acceptance':['workflow dispatch starts','Claude creates a minimal proof commit','commit SHA recorded in governance/provider_gates','provider route may set primary_proven=true only after SHA exists'],'workflow_candidates':workflow_candidates,'created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# If a claude workflow with workflow_dispatch exists, queue a dispatch item with conservative empty inputs.
queued=[]
for c in workflow_candidates:
    if c['has_workflow_dispatch']:
        wf_name=Path(c['path']).name
        q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem691_claude_primary_runtime_proof.json')
        q.write_text(json.dumps({'workflow':wf_name,'ref':'main','inputs':{}},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
        queued.append(str(q))
        break
checks=[
 {'name':'claude_workflow_candidate_found','pass':len(workflow_candidates)>0,'evidence':json.dumps([x['path'] for x in workflow_candidates],ensure_ascii=False)},
 {'name':'dispatchable_candidate_found','pass':any(x['has_workflow_dispatch'] for x in workflow_candidates),'evidence':json.dumps([x['path'] for x in workflow_candidates if x['has_workflow_dispatch']],ensure_ascii=False)},
 {'name':'gate_request_written','pass':gate.exists(),'evidence':str(gate)},
 {'name':'dispatch_queued_if_possible','pass':bool(queued) or not any(x['has_workflow_dispatch'] for x in workflow_candidates),'evidence':json.dumps(queued,ensure_ascii=False)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='claude_primary_proof_dispatch_queued' if queued and not failed else ('claude_workflow_found_manual_dispatch_needed' if workflow_candidates and not queued else 'claude_primary_proof_blocked_no_workflow')
blocker=None if queued else {'code':'CLAUDE_PRIMARY_PROOF_NOT_DISPATCHED','workflow_candidates':[x['path'] for x in workflow_candidates],'reason':'No dispatchable Claude workflow found or queue not created'}
state={'schema_version':'prepare_claude_primary_runtime_proof.v1','bem':'BEM-691','status':status,'checks':checks,'workflow_candidates':workflow_candidates,'queued':queued,'gate_request':str(gate),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem691_prepare_claude_primary_runtime_proof.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem691_prepare_claude_primary_runtime_proof.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-691 | Prepare Claude Primary Runtime Proof | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Workflow candidates: '+str(len(workflow_candidates))+sep+'Queued: '+str(queued)+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem691_prepare_claude_primary_runtime_proof','status':status,'queued':queued,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem691_prepare_claude_primary_runtime_proof.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-691 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(gate),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)]+queued)
ops_applied.append('Prepared Claude primary runtime proof gate and queued dispatch for a dispatchable Claude workflow if available')
"""
No issue comments.
